review_notes:
1) Only `in.tip4p_nve`, `in.tip4p_nve_long`, and `water_216_data.lmp` are present in `.fermilink-optimize/inputs/all`; `in.tip4p_nve_medium`/`large` are not present in this workspace. 2) Goal text contains an example MPI launcher snippet showing `-np 16`; for this target I assumed the explicit requirement “exactly 1 rank” is authoritative. 3) Input scripts currently use `units electron` with TIP4P settings; confirm this is intentional for your benchmark baseline.
- Verify `build/lmp` exists and `mpiexec` (or `mpirun`) is available on `PATH`.
- Verify `FERMILINK_GOAL_INPUT_ROOT` points to the staged workload root; YAML currently sets `.fermilink-optimize/inputs/all`.
- Objective metric is normalized runtime (`wall_seconds_per_100_steps`) and summary uses weighted median of that metric.
- Correctness tolerances cover thermo/atom-count/NaN-Inf fields; force-component field (`forces.xyz`) is not emitted by these current input scripts.
- Runner writes per-run LAMMPS logs to `.fermilink-optimize/runs/autogen/` when benchmark executions run.
